title: lewisia triphylla
intro: Lewisia triphylla, also known as the mountain gem, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lewisia triphylla include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Lewisia triphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal and health benefits.
